mapper.select: WITH CONFIG AS ( SELECT SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD, SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE FROM DOCS_SYSTEM_CONFIG WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD LIKE 'UPDOWN%' ) SELECT MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_CAB_URL') AS "updownCabUrl", MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_CAB_URL_OUT') AS "updownCabUrlOut", MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_SERVER_IP') AS "updownServerIp", MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_SERVER_IP_OUT') AS "updownOutServerIp", MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_SERVER_PORT') AS "updownServerPort", MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_LANG_CODE') AS "updownLangCode", MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_SECRET_KEY') AS "updownSecretKey", MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_IS_SECURITY') AS "updownIsSecurity", MAX(SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE) FILTER (WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'UPDOWN_USER_AUTH') AS "updownUserAuth" FROM CONFIG;

SELECT FILE_PATH_NM AS filePathNm , ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm , FILE_NM AS fileNm , FILE_SIZE AS fileSize , USE_END_YMD AS endDate , OBJECT_ID AS objectId , REQUEST_NO AS requestNo FROM DOCS_REQUEST_FILE
( OBJECT_ID = #{list.objectId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND REQUEST_NO = #{list.requestNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND FILE_NO::text = #{list.fileNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT DOWNLOAD_COUNT FROM DOCS_REQUEST_FILE WHERE FILE_PATH_NM = #{orgFilePath} AND DESTROY_TYPE IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_REQUEST_FILE SET DOWNLOAD_COUNT = DOWNLOAD_COUNT + 1 WHERE FILE_PATH_NM = #{orgFilePath} AND DESTROY_TYPE IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_DOWN_HISTORY (REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, DOWN_COUNT, OBJECT_NO, OBJECT_NM, USER_NM, DOWN_DATE, DOWNLOADED_NAME) VALUES (#{requestNo}, #{objectId} ,#{downCount}, #{objectNo}, #{objectNm}, #{userNm}, #{downDate}, #{downloadedName})

INSERT INTO DOCS_DOCUMENT_ACT_LOG (ACT_TYPE, ACT_TIME, PATH, UUID, OBJECT_ID, POLICY) VALUES ( #{act_type}, #{act_time}, #{path}, #{uuid}, (SELECT OBJECT_ID FROM DOCS_DOWN_HISTORY WHERE DOWNLOADED_NAME = #{uuid}), #{policy} )
